purpose: Determine whether each of the five countersigned DSR trials (MR002-A/B/C + RNG-001 + RNG-EntryLogic) has a DEFENSIBLE FROZEN annualized net Sharpe on a comparable daily-net-return basis, as required to reconstruct sigma_trials per the owner's DSR-dispersion ruling. This census RECORDS availability; it does not manufacture any statistic.
required_convention: annualized net Sharpe = mean(daily net simple return)/std(ddof=1) * sqrt(252), on each trial's FROZEN final verdict configuration/result; no post-hoc selection; no missing trial dropped; no synthetic substitution.

trials.name: MR-002 config A (z-entry 1.75)
trials.result_produced: designed config (no pre-freeze backtest; dev perf not computed)
trials.reason: Never backtested. The MR-002 program invariant is that NO development/validation/OOS performance has been computed; A is a designed z-entry config with no realized return series. A 'validation-period Sharpe' would require opening SEALED validation data (validation_authorization=false) AND running a config never run.

trials.name: MR-002 config B (z-entry 2.00, VERDICT config)
trials.reason: The verdict CONFIGURATION is frozen, but no frozen annualized net Sharpe exists (dev perf not computed). Its OOS Sharpe is exactly what the sealed evaluation will produce LATER; it cannot pre-exist as a trial statistic without opening sealed data.

trials.name: MR-002 config C (z-entry 2.25)
trials.reason: Same as A: designed config, never backtested, no frozen Sharpe.

trials.name: RNG-001 VWAP-deviation fade (prior mean-reversion-family study)
trials.reason: The cited frozen executive summary states a QUALITATIVE verdict (Rejected/Evidenced/Archived) but contains NO annualized net Sharpe value. No defensible frozen Sharpe on a comparable daily-net-return basis is present at the ledger-cited evidence path.

trials.name: RNG range entry-logic sub-study (v0.1/v0.2)
trials.reason: Reports per-trade returns, profit factor (0.70 / 1.53), win rates, and DAY-CLUSTERED CIs on an equal-weight OR-entry portfolio return (idle capital = 0 on non-fills) — but NO annualized net Sharpe, and on a DIFFERENT return basis (opening-range entry, not MR-002 residual-reversion daily net returns). Not comparable and not a frozen Sharpe.

deeper_contradiction: The owner's prescribed procedure lists 'MR002-A/B/C validation-period annualized Sharpe', but (a) A/B/C were never backtested (program invariant: dev perf not computed) and (b) validation is SEALED with validation_authorization=false. The prescribed reconstruction is therefore not executable as written and requires owner reconciliation before any sigma_trials can be bound.
boundary: No sealed data read; no performance computed; no statistic manufactured.
